summary: The dashboard is interactive and public-safe, but 108 source rows still need approved director/company evidence before investment-grade use.

checklist.owner: CRO account holder or approved private company-data provider
checklist.required_for: Director-age thresholds: 50+, 55+, 60+, 65+, and 70+ by company-universe row.
checklist.accepted_format: CSV matching director_export_template.csv with company_number and director_age fields.
checklist.approval_gate: validate_director_export.py passes with zero invalid active-director rows.
checklist.public_policy: Do not publish the filled export; publish only aggregate validated company-universe rows.

checklist.owner: Research operator using the six published wave CSVs
checklist.required_for: 108 company-universe rows that need approved counts or metadata.
checklist.accepted_format: Completed company-universe-wave-N.csv rows with source_note, source_url, source_date, and approved_by filled.
checklist.approval_gate: Each completed wave reconciles to the director-age import and has no count_mismatch rows.
checklist.public_policy: Wave CSVs may stay public only while they contain request rows, not private director data.

checklist.owner: CRO Open Services user or company registry data owner
checklist.required_for: Company-number join keys and company-count baseline checks before aggregation.
checklist.accepted_format: CRO company evidence CSV plus completed company-number join keys.
checklist.approval_gate: Unique active-company counts reconcile to the company universe before approved rows are merged.

checklist.required_for: Keeping advertised-for-sale targets fresh and removing duplicates or irrelevant listings.
checklist.accepted_format: Published sale listing CSV or refreshed source audit with URL, source, observed date, and listing metadata.
checklist.approval_gate: Public sale refresh audit returns status ok and stale/duplicate rows are reviewed.
checklist.public_policy: Public listing metadata and source URLs are publishable; private broker notes are not.

checklist.required_for: Moving rows from sample/incomplete to approved in the dashboard readiness gate.
checklist.accepted_format: source_note, source_url, source_date, approved_by, and validation report references.
checklist.approval_gate: Approved source collection reaches 120 of 120 rows with no placeholder or missing approval fields.
checklist.public_policy: Approval metadata can be published when it identifies source class and reviewer without private personal data.

success_definition: All 120 expected public-source rows are approved.
All director-age threshold counts come from an approved private director/company export.
No filled director-level export or private personal data is committed or published.
Live dashboard verifier passes with collection_progress_status approved_collection_complete.
